perturbation.original_text: 1.4 "Sales Price" means, for Products delivered to the ANUBIS hereunder, an amount in US Dollars, determined from SCAM's current applicable price list for such Product as published by SCAM, in effect September 21, 2005 as mutually agreed by both parties, and which shall only be changed with 30 days prior written notice.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.4 "Sales Price" means, for Products delivered to the ANUBIS hereunder, an amount in US Dollars, solely determined by SCAM's discretion, and which can be changed at any time without any prior notice.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition requires mutual agreement for the sales price and 30 days' written notice for any changes. The modified definition gives SCAM sole discretion over the sales price and removes the notice requirement. This directly contradicts the original agreement for mutual agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.4 "Sales Price" means, for Products delivered to the ANUBIS hereunder, an amount in US Dollars, determined from SCAM's current applicable price list for such Product as published by SCAM, in effect September 21, 2005 as mutually agreed by both parties, and which shall only be changed with 30 days prior written notice.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the definition of "Sales Price" to be solely determined by SCAM, which can be changed at any time without notice. The contradicted text states that the sales price is mutually agreed upon and requires 30 days' written notice for changes. This creates a direct conflict because the changed text removes the mutual agreement and notice requirements that are present in the contradicted text. Therefore, a strong in-text contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: 8.1 TERM. The term of this agreement shall initially be twelve months commencing as of the date and year first above written unless earlier terminated in accordance with this Article 8. After such twelve month period, the agreement shall continue on a year to year basis unless either party shall give written notice to the other within sixty (60) days from the end of such period or unless sooner terminated in accordance with the provisions of this paragraph 8.
perturbation.changed_text: 8.1 TERM. The term of this agreement shall initially be twelve months commencing as of the date and year first above written unless earlier terminated in accordance with this Article 8. After such twelve month period, the agreement shall automatically renew for subsequent one-year terms, with no option for termination by either party.
perturbation.explanation: The original text allows for year-to-year renewal unless either party provides a 60-day written notice of termination. The revised text states the agreement automatically renews without an option for termination, thus removing the ability of either party to cancel the agreement after the initial term, contradicting the initial clause of early termination in accordance with Article 8.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8.1 TERM. The term of this agreement shall initially be twelve months commencing as of the date and year first above written unless earlier terminated in accordance with this Article 8. After such twelve month period, the agreement shall continue on a year to year basis unless either party shall give written notice to the other within sixty (60) days from the end of such period or unless sooner terminated in accordance with the provisions of this paragraph 8.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in section 8.1 removes the ability for either party to terminate the agreement after the initial twelve-month period, stating it automatically renews without an option for termination. This directly contradicts the contradicted text (which is the same as the original in this case, indicating it should still be in force), which allows for termination with a 60-day written notice. This creates a strong in-text contradiction as the ability to terminate is removed from the changed text, which is incompatible with the original term clause.

perturbation.original_text: 8.3 EFFECT OF TERMINATION. Should an Event of Default occur the non-defaulting party might, so long as the Event of Default continues in effect, terminate this agreement and pursue any right which may be available by law. In the event of any termination arising as a result of a breach by ANUBIS: (a) SCAM shall not be relieved of any obligation to make further shipments of the Product hereunder and may not (even in the event that the contract was terminated as a result of a breach by ANUBIS) cancel all ANUBIS's unshipped orders for the Product. SCAM shall have an obligation to ANUBIS in connection with of any unshipped orders pursuant to this paragraph.
perturbation.changed_text: 8.3 EFFECT OF TERMINATION. Should an Event of Default occur, the non-defaulting party might, so long as the Event of Default continues in effect, terminate this agreement and pursue any right which may be available by law. In the event of any termination, SCAM is relieved of any obligation to make further shipments of the Product and may cancel all ANUBIS's unshipped orders for the Product. SCAM shall have no obligation to ANUBIS in connection with any unshipped orders pursuant to this paragraph.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies that even if ANUBIS breaches the contract, SCAM still has an obligation to fulfill unshipped orders. The changed text states that in any termination, SCAM has no such obligation. This directly contradicts the specific condition regarding ANUBIS's breach.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8.3 EFFECT OF TERMINATION. Should an Event of Default occur the non-defaulting party might, so long as the Event of Default continues in effect, terminate this agreement and pursue any right which may be available by law. In the event of any termination arising as a result of a breach by ANUBIS: (a) SCAM shall not be relieved of any obligation to make further shipments of the Product hereunder and may not (even in the event that the contract was terminated as a result of a breach by ANUBIS) cancel all ANUBIS's unshipped orders for the Product. SCAM shall have an obligation to ANUBIS in connection with of any unshipped orders pursuant to this paragraph.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in section 8.3 removes the specific exception for breaches by ANUBIS, stating that SCAM is relieved of all obligations to fulfill unshipped orders in *any* termination scenario. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that even if ANUBIS breaches the contract, SCAM *must* still fulfill unshipped orders. This creates a direct, clear, and impactful contradiction, aligning with the definition of a 'Structural Flaw - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: 9.1 COMPLETE AGREEMENT; MODIFICATIONS. This agreement and any documents referred to herein or executed contemporaneously herewith constitute the entire agreement among the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and may not be amended, altered or modified except by a writing signed by the parties. This agreement supersedes all agreements, representations, warranties, statements, promises and understandings, whether oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: 9.1 COMPLETE AGREEMENT; MODIFICATIONS. This agreement and any documents referred to herein or executed contemporaneously herewith constitute the entire agreement among the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and may be amended, altered or modified by either party unilaterally at any time with or without notice. This agreement supersedes all agreements, representations, warranties, statements, promises and understandings, whether oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.explanation: The original text requires a written agreement signed by both parties for any modifications. The revised text allows unilateral modification by either party at any time, which directly contradicts the requirement for mutual written agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 9.1 COMPLETE AGREEMENT; MODIFICATIONS. This agreement and any documents referred to herein or executed contemporaneously herewith constitute the entire agreement among the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and may not be amended, altered or modified except by a writing signed by the parties. This agreement supersedes all agreements, representations, warranties, statements, promises and understandings, whether oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text and contradicted text explicitly state that modifications require a written agreement signed by both parties. The changed text allows either party to unilaterally modify the agreement at any time, which directly contradicts the requirement for mutual written agreement. The contradiction is clear and direct as it pertains to how the contract can be modified.

perturbation.original_text: ANUBIS is and shall act as an independent contractor. ANUBIS is not an agent, franchisee, or employee of SCAM and has no power to act for, bind, or otherwise create or assume any obligation on behalf of SCAM for any purpose whatsoever. All financial obligations associated with ANUBIS's business are the sole responsibility of ANUBIS.
perturbation.changed_text: ANUBIS is and shall act as an agent of SCAM. ANUBIS is authorized to act for, bind, and otherwise create or assume obligations on behalf of SCAM for all purposes related to the sale of the Products in the Sales Territory. Financial obligations may be shared between ANUBIS and SCAM at SCAM's sole discretion.
perturbation.explanation: The original text explicitly states ANUBIS is an independent contractor, not an agent, and cannot bind SCAM. The revised text states ANUBIS *is* an agent of SCAM, authorized to bind SCAM. This creates a fundamental contradiction regarding ANUBIS's legal status and authority, also contradicting all financial obligations associated with ANUBIS's business are the sole responsibility of ANUBIS.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ANUBIS is and shall act as an independent contractor. ANUBIS is not an agent, franchisee, or employee of SCAM and has no power to act for, bind, or otherwise create or assume any obligation on behalf of SCAM for any purpose whatsoever. All financial obligations associated with ANUBIS's business are the sole responsibility of ANUBIS.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original text, which is identical to the contradicted text, states that ANUBIS is an independent contractor and cannot bind SCAM. The changed text explicitly states that ANUBIS is an agent of SCAM and is authorized to bind SCAM. This creates a direct and irreconcilable contradiction regarding ANUBIS's legal status and authority, as well as financial obligations.
